question: This line chart displays average satisfaction scores (1–10) by department. Which of the following statements is most accurate?

options.A: Finance has the highest average satisfaction score among all departments shown.
options.B: The chart indicates a smooth and predictable improvement in satisfaction from the first to the last department.
options.C: Support has the lowest average satisfaction score among all departments shown.
options.D: All departments have nearly identical satisfaction scores, with no clear differences.

explanation: This line chart uses a continuous line over department that are purely categorical (e.g., Engineering, Operations, Marketing, ...). Connecting points suggests there is a meaningful smooth progression from left to right, which is conceptually incorrect — these categories have no inherent numeric order. The y‑axis values are on a 1 to 10 scale, but any comparison across categories should be made with a discrete chart such as a bar chart, not by reading trends from the connecting line.
